items.title_en: Turkish police order 83 arrests over online praise for school shootings

items.desc_en: At least nine were killed in a school shooting in southern Turkey on Wednesday, a day after another attack injured 16 people at a high school.

items.desc_zh: 苏塞克斯公爵夫人与她的丈夫一起向墨尔本的年轻人讲述社交媒体的危害。
